---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: false
---

📄 **Download the full PDF:** [sandstedt_CV_may_2026.pdf](pdfs/sandstedt_CV_may_2026.pdf)


<!-- Inline PDF preview (works in most browsers; falls back to download) -->
<object data="pdfs/sandstedt_CV_may_2026.pdf" type="application/pdf"
        width="100%" height="900px"
        style="border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#e2ddd1);border-radius:8px;">
  <p>Your browser cannot display the PDF inline.
     <a href="pdfs/sandstedt_CV_may_2026.pdf">Download it here</a>.</p>
</object>
